user_system_path: Health + settings + run-brief guard must agree on fresh/stale/disconnected/reauth connector truth before generation.
forbidden_files_raw: `lib/briefing/**`, `lib/cron/**`, `app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, outbound email paths, paid generation routes beyond the stale-guard check`

required_product_proof: npx playwright test tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --grep "shows stale Google clearly while Microsoft stays fresh" --reporter=list
required_browser_proof: npx playwright test tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --grep "shows stale Google clearly while Microsoft stays fresh" --reporter=list
acceptance_condition: Connector freshness is explicit and consistent before generation: Foldera says which source is stale/disconnected/reauth_required, preserves the healthy source truth, and generation warns or blocks safely instead of pretending the loop is ready.
stop_condition: Backlog emptiness alone is not a valid stop state. If Codex cannot prove that at least one production rung advanced, the run did not count.
source_truth_finding: Current command state or health truth shows stale/disconnected/reauth connector state while generation can still look runnable.
required_closure_update: Update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md so the current command state records the repaired connector freshness truth or the exact remaining external blocker.
browser_proof_command: npx playwright test tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --grep "shows stale Google clearly while Microsoft stays fresh" --reporter=list
anti_regression_checks: Connector freshness is explicit and consistent before generation: Foldera says which source is stale/disconnected/reauth_required
and generation warns or blocks safely instead of pretending the loop is ready.
